name: search-inside-yourself-the-unexpected-path-to-achieving-success-happiness-and-world-peace
description: Chade-Meng Tan's mindfulness and emotional intelligence program from Google — practical techniques for attention training, EQ, self-confidence, empathy, and leadership, designed for busy professionals.
useCase: Develop mindfulness and emotional intelligence skills for personal wellbeing, professional success, and better relationships.
knownRisks: Requires consistent practice — no quick fixes
Some may find the 'world peace' framing too idealistic
Corporate mindfulness programs have been criticized as superficial
